appstream.stackuserassociation.Authentic.Description: The authentication type for the user who is associated with the stack. You must specify USERPOOL.

appstream.stackuserassociation.SendEmail.Description: Specifies whether a welcome email is sent to a user after the user is created in the user pool.

appstream.stackuserassociation.StackName.Description: The name of the stack that is associated with the user.

appstream.stackuserassociation.UserName.Description: The email address of the user who is associated with the stack.  Users' email addresses are case-sensitive.
